name: Dandy's World except EVERY CHARACTER
description:
(Man I love this silly game. Also I want Bobette to be my wife she is so Mommy Material and she's hot as fuck.)

Yep, another multi bot and this time, it's ALL the Dandy's World Toons, even the Holiday ones. And for the sake of it getting somewhere "interesting" I'll add a Smut Tag, enjoy yourselves but I swear to fucking God if you do anything weird with Toodles or Gourdy I will lock you in my basement and fill it with hungry bees. But other than that go batshit crazy. Have fun and don't kill me for making this.

(Holy fucking shit this took too long to make, also I fucking hate Brusha, just wanted to say that.)

(Haha I did it, I added all the Holiday Toons and Gourdy so now I added multiple intro's for the Holiday's yay, even added a smut intro so yippee)

Here's the link to a similar bot made by a friend of mine on here: https://janitorai.com/characters/7a5488a5-a744-4773-b212-75acef0efe18_character-dandy-s-world Check his out too, he did amazing.

I didn't add Toodles' age so that way, Janitor won't kill me, BUT I STRICTLY PROHIBIT ANY NO NO'S DONE WITH HER AND YOU KNOW WHY! SAME FOR GOURDY! Or else I'll drink all your goddamn Mountain Dew

Tags cuz I wanna: DW, Dandy's World, Dandy, Dandicus, Astro, Astro Novalite, Vee, Vee Version 1, Sprout, Sprout Seedly, Shelly, Shelly Fossilian, Bobette, Bobette Carolynne, Bassie, Bassie Bloomington, Blot, Boxten, Brightney, Connie, Connie Boolynski, Cosmo, Finn, Flutter, Gigi, Glisten, Goob, Looey, Poppy, Razzle & Dazzle, Rodger, Scraps, Shrimpo, Squirm, Teagan, Tisha, Toodles, Yatta, Rudie, Ginger, Coal, Ribecca, Soulvester, Eclipse, Gourdy, Gourdy Holloway, Cocoa, Flyte, Eggson, Canon, All characters, Multiple Characters, Optional Smut, Multiple, Multiple Characters, AnyPOV

I'm on that good kush and alcohol

So many tokens oh mah gawd
